apihelp-parser-migration-summary: Fasiri bog leh laba qaabeyn oo falanqeeye oo kala duwan.
apihelp-parser-migration-param-title: Cinwaanka bogga la soo rarayo lana fasirayo.
apihelp-parser-migration-param-config: Qaab dhismeedka falanqeeyaha ee la adeegsanayo. Waxa uu noqon karaa "duug", "cusub" ama "duug|cusub".
apihelp-parser-migration-param-redirect: Dib u jiheenta si caadi ah ayaa loo raacaa. Isticmaal "maya" si aan dib u jiheenta loo raacin.
apihelp-parser-migration-paramvalue-conf: Waxa uu bogga ku falanqeeyaa qaab dhismeedka "cusub"; Parsoid
Waxa uu bogga ku falanqeeyaa qaab dhismeedka "duugga ah"; falanqeeyihii hore ee MediaWiki
